title: Three-level nested subquery with correlation
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_trending_in_top_category/0` that returns posts from the single category with the most total comments, ranked within that category. This needs: (1) innermost subquery: comments grouped by category_id, selecting `max category_id`, (2) middle: posts filtered to that category id, (3) outermost: post ranking with row_number. Or equivalently: use a CTE-like structure. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Nested subqueries with aggregates + window + filter is close to the limit of what Ecto query composition supports cleanly.
